Loops unofficial F-Droid Repository

This is an unofficial Loops.Video F-Droid repository If you are unsure about this repo, please use the official Google Play Store app, or their GitHub https://github.com/joinloops/loops-expo

Currently it serves 1 apps. To add it to your F-Droid app, scan the QR code (click it to enlarge) or use this link:

https://apt-gdmc.ddns.net/repo

If you would like to manually verify the fingerprint (SHA-256) of the repository signing key, here it is:
98 3A 10 52 94 BE 00 BE CD DF 69 B2 60 EC AA FE F1 83 A9 34 15 AE 09 35 C4 5A 8B 28 2B CA D7 81
